Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] New framework support (adds migration support for a new framework)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm run test:run`)
- [ ] New tests added for this change
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tested with a real-world test file migration

Describe any breaking changes and migration steps, or write "None".

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style
